Operation 'listRequests' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary and description are too generic. Added specificity about pagination support, return type (RequestLog objects), and use cases. Clarified that this retrieves logged requests for auditing purposes, which helps AI agents understand when to use this operation.

data.current_description: Get a list of logged requests
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve paginated list of logged HTTP requests
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of all logged HTTP requests processed by the Rejax API. Supports filtering and sorting parameters to narrow results. Returns an array of RequestLog objects containing request details, timestamps, and response information. Useful for auditing, monitoring, and analyzing request history.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description are too generic. Added specificity about pagination support, return type (RequestLog objects), and use cases. Clarified that this retrieves logged requests for auditing purposes, which helps AI agents understand when to use this operation.

message: Operation 'getRequest' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details. Original description lacks specificity about what details are returned. Added information about the RequestLog schema, specific fields returned, and practical use cases. This helps AI agents understand what data they'll receive and when to use this operation.

data.current_description: Get details of a specific request
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve detailed information for a specific logged request
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves complete details for a specific logged HTTP request by its ID. Returns a RequestLog object containing the full request payload, response data, headers, status code, and processing timestamp. Use this to inspect individual request-response cycles for debugging or auditing purposes.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks specificity about what details are returned. Added information about the RequestLog schema, specific fields returned, and practical use cases. This helps AI agents understand what data they'll receive and when to use this operation.

message: Operation 'proxyRequest' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is adequate, but description needs significant enhancement. Added details about ProxyRequest input schema, ProxyResponse output schema, authentication requirement, and practical use cases. This clarifies what the operation does and helps AI agents determine when to use it for proxying requests.

data.current_description: Make an HTTP request through Rejax proxy
data.description_suggestion: Forwards an HTTP request through the Rejax proxy service to a target URL. Accepts a ProxyRequest object specifying the target URL, HTTP method, headers, and body. Returns a ProxyResponse containing the target server's response status, headers, and body. Useful for testing APIs, bypassing CORS restrictions, or logging HTTP interactions. Requires API key authentication.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate, but description needs significant enhancement.
